name: jw-advpl-marketplace
description: Marketplace jw-advpl — fork de plugadvpl (JoniPraia) por JobwiseTec. Plugin Claude Code + CLI para ADVPL/TLPP (TOTVS Protheus): indexa fontes em SQLite/FTS5, compila via advpls, edita .prw cp1252 sem corromper acentos, guarda credenciais no cofre do OS.

plugins.name: jw-advpl
plugins.description: Fork jw-advpl do plugadvpl (Protheus ADVPL/TLPP): índice SQLite/FTS5, lint, compile via advpls, edit cp1252, cofre de credenciais. ~16× menos contexto. Base: plugadvpl (JoniPraia, MIT).
